# Digital Twin — serdna.dev

<!-- Generated by osis. Last update: 2026-04-04 -->

## Identity

**Product:** serdna.dev — Personal portfolio and hiring site for Andres Campos.
**Domain:** serdna.dev
**JTBD:** Convince a hiring manager, CTO, or recruiter that Andres is a senior/staff-caliber full-stack and AI engineer worth interviewing — in under 2 minutes of scrolling.
**Primary metric:** Inbound interview requests (email, LinkedIn, Calendly).
**Secondary metric:** Resume downloads, voice agent sessions, case study depth clicks.

---

---

## Product Loops

### Loop 1: The 15-Second Scan (Recruiter)
Hero loads --> name, title, tagline land --> citizenship flags register global availability --> "Get in touch" or "Resume" clicked --> exit.
**Status:** Functional. Missing stats column and SVG background.

### Loop 2: The 2-Minute Evaluation (CTO / Hiring Manager)
Hero --> scroll to Work bento --> scan 6 project cards (visual hierarchy communicates range) --> scroll through Build pillars --> timeline registers career arc --> Contact section --> email or Calendly.
**Status:** Functional end-to-end on root page. No deep-dive case study pages yet.

### Loop 3: The Deep Dive (Technical Evaluator)
Work card click --> case study page with problem/approach/architecture/learnings --> back to portfolio --> Contact.
**Status:** NOT BUILT. Work cards link to `/work/[slug]` but no pages exist. Case study copy exists in `docs/case-studies/copy/`.

### Loop 4: The Voice Conversation (Stretch)
Floating "Talk to me" button --> opens voice agent --> visitor talks to an AI with Andres' voice and context --> converts via conversation.
**Status:** PLACEHOLDER. Button exists. Label changes per section via IntersectionObserver. No LiveKit integration.

---

## Actors

| Actor | Arrives via | Goal | Time budget | Key conversion |
|-------|-------------|------|-------------|----------------|
| Recruiter | LinkedIn, job board | Screen for fit | 15 seconds | Resume PDF, email |
| CTO / Eng Lead | Resume link, referral | Evaluate depth | 2 minutes | Email, case study |
| Founder | Referral, Upwork/Toptal | Validate credibility | 1 minute | Calendly, email |
| Andres (operator) | Dashboard (PostHog) | Track conversion funnel | -- | Analytics events |

---

## Systems

### S1: Root Page (Single-Scroll Portfolio)
**JTBD:** Deliver the full pitch in one uninterrupted scroll.
**Contains:** 7 sections — Hero, Work, Build, Values, Timeline, Signal, Contact.
**Maturity:** BETA. All 7 sections render. Work bento is polished. Timeline, Values, Signal are built but lack final content/assets. Hero missing stats column.

### S2: Parallax Portrait Engine
**JTBD:** Create a memorable first impression via a 2.5D interactive portrait.
**How:** WebGL fragment shader displaces portrait pixels using a depth map. Mouse position drives parallax. Pre-blurred depth map prevents hard edges.
**Maturity:** SHIPPED. Fully functional. Performant.

### S3: Sliding Text (Brand Reveal)
**JTBD:** Reinforce the "serdna = andres reversed" brand through interaction.
**How:** React island. Split-flap mechanical animation cycling through alphabet on hover.
**Maturity:** SHIPPED.

### S4: Work Bento Grid
**JTBD:** Show range and quality across 6 projects in a single glance.
**How:** 3-column CSS grid with spanning cards. Image cycling (InitialCommit), video background (DeepMesh), solid color cards (CloudCapture), logo overlays.
**Maturity:** SHIPPED. Minor polish: Envoy logo color, CloudCapture needs video.

### S5: Context-Aware Voice Agent (TalkToMe)
**JTBD:** Let visitors converse with an AI representation of Andres.
**How:** React island. IntersectionObserver updates label per section. Planned: LiveKit voice agent with cloned voice.
**Maturity:** PLACEHOLDER. UI shell only. No voice backend.

### S6: Case Study Pages (/work/[slug])
**JTBD:** Provide deep technical proof for CTOs evaluating specific projects.
**How:** Planned as both modal overlay and standalone pages. Content source: `docs/case-studies/copy/`.
**Maturity:** NOT BUILT. Links exist on cards but resolve to nothing.

### S7: Blog / Signal Section
**JTBD:** Demonstrate thinking depth through authored content.
**How:** 4 card grid with quote, title, teaser. Currently display-only (no linked pages).
**Maturity:** ALPHA. Cards render. No `/signal/[slug]` pages. No squiggle interaction.

### S8: Analytics & Tracking
**JTBD:** Measure conversion funnel (visit --> section view --> CTA click --> contact).
**How:** Planned: PostHog with custom events.
**Maturity:** NOT BUILT. No PostHog integration present in codebase.

---

## Architecture

```
Framework:      Astro 5 (Islands Architecture)
Interactive:    React 19 islands (SlidingText, TalkToMe)
Rendering:      WebGL (portrait), GSAP (scroll animations)
Styling:        Tailwind CSS v4
Animation:      GSAP + ScrollTrigger (scroll), Motion/Framer (React)
Content:        Static data in index.astro (not yet content collections)
Hosting:        Vercel (planned), domain: serdna.dev
Monorepo:       Turborepo — apps/serdna/
Package mgr:    Bun
```

### Key Integrations (Planned, Not Yet Wired)
- PostHog (analytics)
- LiveKit (voice agent)
- Calendly (booking, added to Contact section)
- Resend (not needed here -- used in onc9.com)

### Content Pipeline
Case study raw material lives in `docs/case-studies/` (full research) and `docs/case-studies/copy/` (polished dual-framing copy). The site uses employer framing (Version A). Content is NOT yet wired into Astro content collections -- it is hardcoded in `index.astro`.

---

## Gaps (Ranked by Hiring Impact)

1. **Case study pages do not exist.** Work cards link to dead routes. This is the single biggest gap -- CTOs click these.
2. **No resume PDF** in `public/`. The hero links to `/resume.pdf` which 404s.
3. **No analytics.** Zero visibility into visitor behavior. PostHog is planned but not integrated.
4. **Blog posts are display-only.** Signal section cards are not clickable. Low priority but contributes to "depth" perception.
5. **Voice agent is a shell.** LiveKit integration deferred. Acceptable -- placeholder is honest.
6. **Hero stats column missing.** Spec calls for stats on the right; not implemented.
7. **No SEO infrastructure.** Missing meta tags, OG images, JSON-LD, sitemap, robots.txt.
8. **Mobile not audited.** Desktop-first build. Responsive behavior untested.

---

## Relationship to Monorepo

serdna.dev is one of multiple apps in the cloudnine Turborepo. It is meant to pull portfolio data from `packages/portfolio` (shared source of truth). Currently it does NOT -- all project data is hardcoded in `index.astro`. The sibling app `apps/onc9/` (onc9.com) is the studio-facing site with client framing.
